name: Systems using many different protocols
notes: This rule triggers when local systems are connecting to the internet on more than 50 DST ports in one hour. Connections must be successful. This rule can be edited to also detect failed communications which may also be useful.
conditions_text: when the context is Local to Remote
when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Accept, BB:CategoryDefinition: Successful Communication, BB:DeviceDefinition: FW / Router / Switch
when at least 50 events or flows are seen with the same Source IP and different Destination Port in 1 hour(s)
thresholds: when at least 50 events or flows are seen with the same Source IP and different Destination Port in 1 hour(s)
TD_list: APPLY Systems using many different protocols on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the context is Local to Remote
AND when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Accept, BB:CategoryDefinition: Successful Communication, BB:DeviceDefinition: FW / Router / Switch
AND when at least 50 events or flows are seen with the same Source IP and different Destination Port in 1 hour(s)
RED_list: Event name: Systems using many different protocols to the internet

Event description: Detects when local systems are connecting to the internet on more than 50 DST ports in one hour. This can indicate a lot of different activities from P2P file sharing, VoIP and many other services.
